rationale: It gives a concrete rotation witness and verifies that applying it maps a exactly to b.
The response claims g_3 is a witness even though its own trace explicitly says that g_3 does not map a to b.
It uses the color multiset invariant decisively to prove that no position permutation can map a to b.
It combines connecting count zero with the decisive multiset mismatch to prove the configurations are not in the same orbit.
It explicitly applies rho^5 and verifies that the resulting tuple equals b.
It supplies a valid transform trace, stabilizer information, and an explicit witness mapping a to b.
